description: Letter in Arabic script. The portion preserved here consists mostly of greetings, naming people such as Muḥammad b. Yaḥyā, ʿAbd al-Laṭīf al-Ḥādī, Nūr al-Dīn, Quṭb al-Dīn, and the faqīh Saʿd al-Dīn. The verso has some invocations and a note that the letter was written on the 3rd of Shawwāl. Needs further examination.
description_he: מכתב בערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
